description: An old structure needs to be demolished. An engineer must create a safe demolition plan.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original construction drawings for the structure to understand how it was built.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer finds the old drawings to analyze the structure.

nodes.task_description: Develop a step-by-step demolition sequence that ensures stability at all stages.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer creates a detailed plan for deconstruction.

nodes.task_description: Document the plan, including required equipment and safety precautions, and submit it for review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a formal demolition plan document and submits it for approval.
